question: Identify the tense: 'She has been studying English for five years.'
Choose the correct passive voice: 'The manager approved the proposal.'
options: The proposal approved by the manager.
The proposal was approved by the manager.
The proposal is approved by the manager.
The proposal had approved by the manager.

question: Identify the type of sentence: 'What a beautiful sunset!'
Choose the correct indirect speech: He said, 'I am busy.'
options: He said that he is busy.
He said that he was busy.
He says that he was busy.

question: Select the correctly ordered sentence.
Choose the correct transformation: 'No other city is as large as Delhi.'
options: Delhi is larger than any other city.
Delhi is larger than all cities.

question: Choose the correct conditional sentence.
options: If I was rich, I would travel.
If I were rich, I would travel.
If I am rich, I would travel.
If I be rich, I travel.

question: Choose the correct form: Neither the teacher nor the students ___ present.
Identify the error: 'The committee have taken its decision.'
Choose the correct article: He is ___ MBA graduate.
Choose the correct preposition: She insisted ___ paying the bill.
Choose the correct synonym of 'Meticulous'.
Choose the antonym of 'Obsolete'.
Identify the figure of speech: 'The classroom was a zoo.'
Choose the correctly punctuated sentence.
Choose the correct one-word substitution for 'One who knows many languages'.
Choose the correct voice: 'People speak English all over the world.'
options: English is spoken all over the world.
English was spoken all over the world.
English has spoken all over the world.
English speaks all over the world.

question: Choose the correct form: Hardly had he arrived ___ it started raining.
Choose the correct idiom meaning of 'Break the ice'.
Choose the correct sentence.
options: Each of the players have arrived.
Each of the players has arrived.
